mapper.sql: SELECT MEMBER_NO , MEMBER_ID , MEMBER_NAME , EMAIL , PHONE_NUMBER , ADDRESS , ENROLL_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , STATUS FROM MARKET_MEMBER
mapper.update: UPDATE MARKET_MEMBER SET MEMBER_PWD = #{changePwd} , MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND MEMBER_PWD = #{currentPwd} AND STATUS = 'N'
UPDATE MARKET_MEMBER SET STATUS = 'Y' WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND MEMBER_PWD = #{memberPwd} AND STATUS = 'N'
